sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.R.A. No. 351 of 2025 I.T.R.A. No. 352 of 2025 I.T.R.A. No. 353 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection No.29&31 2. For order on CMA No.2346/2025 (exemption) 3. For hearing of Main Case 28.01.2026 Mr. Imtiaz holding brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate These matters are pending since 2025 without any progress, even notices have not been sought/issued till date. Applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. Record demonstrates that the applicant has taken no effort to get the matter listed and even today brief is held on behalf of learned counsel for the Petitioner and adjournment sought without any cogent reason. It appears that the Applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported in PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office to place copy of this order in each connected reference application. Judge Judge Ashraf
